text:
Miniature Mermaid (手乗り人魚) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game.
__NOTOC__

Summary

Miniature Mermaid 手乗り人魚 - This card summons forth a miniature mermaid, small enough to sit on the palm of your hand. When she is in a good mood, she will sing songs with her beautiful voice. Any person hearing her songs will feel in high spirits. A pleasant and comfortable living environment is the most common thing to lighten her mood.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.049 :: 手乗り人魚 
その名の通り、手に乗るほどの大きさの人魚。棲み心地が良い場所だと機嫌が良くなり、とても美しい声で歌うことがある。
|-
![Eng]
|No.049 :: Miniature Mermaid 
As the name suggests, a mermaid about the size of a hand and can fit on your palm. It will be in a good mood when placed in a comfortable environment, and will sing with a very beautiful voice.
|}
